user.title: Connect to Control4
user.description: Enter your Control4 account credentials and the local IP address of your controller.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Control4 Director. Check the IP address and that the controller is online.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check your Control4 account email and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Control4 controller is already configured.

group_zones.name: Group Zones
group_zones.description: Links follower rooms to a leader room so they mirror volume and source selection.

leader_room_id.name: Leader Room ID
leader_room_id.description: The Control4 item ID of the room to lead the group.

follower_room_ids.name: Follower Room IDs
follower_room_ids.description: List of Control4 item IDs to follow the leader.

ungroup_zones.name: Ungroup Zones
ungroup_zones.description: Removes the specified rooms from any zone group.

room_ids.name: Room IDs
room_ids.description: List of Control4 item IDs to ungroup.

sync_volume_to_group.name: Sync Volume to Group
sync_volume_to_group.description: Force the leader room's current volume out to all followers immediately.

leader_room_id.name: Leader Room ID
leader_room_id.description: The Control4 item ID of the leader room.
